name: getDatasetFields
description: List all fields in an events or traces dataset (kind `events`, `otel.traces`, etc.). For metrics datasets (kind `otel-metrics-v1`), use `listMetrics()` and `listMetricTags()` instead — field schemas are not meaningful for that dataset type.

datasetName.description: The dataset name. You can find an list of datasets using the `listDatasets()` tool.
